caption: This video clip captures a presentation on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" for "Tutorial – 1" by "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The presentation features a blue header and footer with white text. Centered on the screen is a mathematical formula: "y = ((h1 - h2) - (1 - ε)(h1 - hg)) / ((h1 - hf) - (1 - ε)(h1 - hg))", accompanied by the value "ε2 = 0.95" highlighted in yellow. As the video progresses, the first two frames remain identical. In the third frame, a cursor appears on the white background. In the final frame, a data table is introduced below the formula. This table contains columns labeled "1", "2", "f", and "g", with corresponding values for pressure "p (bar)", temperature "T (K)", enthalpy "h (J/g)", and entropy "s (J/gK)".
